responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the IVX Owner AI chat room end to end: resolve the Vercel AI Gateway 401 authentication failure, implement provider fallback, sanitize UI errors, and deploy to production тАФ per the user's FINAL BLOCK directive.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (Swift project origin)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands: no raw stack traces in UI, structured server-side logging, real test proof
- User's FINAL BLOCK directive: audit whether Vercel AI Gateway is required; if NOT required, remove it and route directly to the configured AI provider; if required, verify key/team/header; then test owner-room end-to-end and deploy
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key тАФ only Vercel access

## Progress
### Done
- Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components тАФ TypeScript compiles with 0 errors
- Render repo repoint completed: was pinned to deleted `rork-ivxholding--1`, repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`; deploy `dep-d981qea8qa3s73b0gpp0` went live
- Production commit match verified: GitHub SHA `dcbf86fa` = Render SHA = `/health` SHA = `/version` SHA
- Owner auth verified live: `GET /api/ivx/owner-auth/diagnostic` тЖТ 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds probe тЖТ HTTP 401
- Enterprise guard bug found: 28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` call `assertIVXOwnerOnly(req)` without await тЖТ unhandled rejection тЖТ crash тЖТ 502
- Enterprise guard fix written locally: added `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper, replaced all 28 bare calls, compiles тАФ not yet deployed
- Full 100-module breakdown delivered
- CRM verified present: `ivx-investor-crm.ts` (291 lines), `ivx-crm-dedup.ts` (313 lines), `ivx-lead-scoring.ts`, `ivx-deal-tracking.ts`
- GitHub repo timeline verified: created March 1, 2026, 143 commits, last push July 9, 2026
- Workspace synced with GitHub repo тАФ only 1 diff: `expo/package.json` (SDK patch bumps)
- `expo-env.d.ts` restored from GitHub
- Cloudflare Worker provisioned at `ivx26-backend.rork.app` тАФ enhanced with `env-check`, `gateway-test`, `render-test`, `render-set-ai-key` actions; codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1` deployed
- Expo SDK patches fixed: `expo` 54.0.35, `expo-file-system` 19.0.23, `expo-font` 14.0.12, `expo-router` 6.0.24
- `bun install` successful: 1028 packages
- `expo-doctor` passed all project checks
- Metro bundler: web export 3,719 modules, 13.8 MB, zero errors; iOS bundle 4,235 modules, 9.7 MB, zero errors
- Expo Go QR tunnel set up and live: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081)
- Render `GET /health` тЖТ HTTP 200, serving commit `dcbf86f`
- **AI gateway auth fix implemented (4 files, compiled, 21/21 tests pass, 0 TS errors in changed files)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: `auth` failures now retryable across providers; `Unauthenticated`/`invalid api key`/`ai_gateway_api_key` patterns added to `classifyProviderFailure`
  - `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: missing gateway key no longer hard-throws before fallback chain runs; `hasGatewayKey` gate skips gateway loop when key absent; streaming path returns clean error chunk instead of crashing; timestamps added to failure logs
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: raw stack traces/origin frames removed from UI forever; chat bubble shows "IVX AI is temporarily unavailable. Retrying securely."; full diagnostics kept server-side as structured logs (`traceId`, `roomId`, provider, model, `httpStatus`, `failureKind`, `sanitizedError`, timestamp); `providerError` client payload reduced to `{isTimeout, isGatewayFailure, errorName, status, retriable}` тАФ no stack, no message, no origin
  - `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: fallback trigger list updated to include `'auth'`
- **Live credential validation performed (proof of 401)**:
  - Vercel key `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ` (60 chars, ends HTYQ) тЖТ sent directly to `https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v1/credits` and `/v1/chat/completions` тЖТ **HTTP 401 "Authentication failed. Check that your Vercel credential is valid and has access to AI Gateway."** тАФ confirmed dead on Vercel's side
  - Render key `rnd_1H0XCq` (10 chars) тЖТ sent to `https://api.render.com/v1/services/srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` тЖТ **HTTP 401 "Unauthorized"** тАФ key is truncated preview, not the full ~35-char key
  - Both keys tested via Cloudflare Worker server-side AND directly via curl from sandbox тАФ identical 401 results
- Rork AI proxy skill docs reviewed: `EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL` (e.g. `toolkit.rork.com`) acts as reverse proxy for AI requests, forwarding to Vercel AI Gateway upstream тАФ requires `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` for auth; `EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL` is empty (0 chars) in current sandbox

### In Progress
- **FINAL BLOCK execution**: auditing whether Vercel AI Gateway is actually required or can be replaced with direct provider routing тАФ `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` currently hardcodes `createGateway` from `ai` package as the only provider path; need to determine if direct OpenAI/Anthropic SDK calls or the Rork proxy can replace it

### Blocked
- **`AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` is invalid (proven 401)**: Vercel rejects the key live тАФ key is either from a team without AI Gateway access or was revoked; no code fix can resolve this
- **`RENDER_API_KEY` is truncated**: only 10 of ~35 chars arrived (`rnd_1H0XCq`) тАФ user copied the dashboard preview, not the full key (full key only visible once at creation time)
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed "I not have openAi key" тАФ direct OpenAI fallback cannot be configured
- **`EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL` and `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` not set**: Rork proxy alternative not currently configured
- **Code fixes not deployed to production**: 4-file fix is local only; needs GitHub push тЖТ Render auto-deploy, but Render API key is truncated so automated deploy is blocked
- **`createApp` for react-native rejected**: platform hard limit (Swift project origin)
- **`runChecks` on expo fails**: "No app found at 'expo'. Available app paths: 'ios' (swift), 'functions' (cloudflare)."
- **Enterprise guard fix not deployed**: local only, rides next sync

## Key Decisions
- `auth` failures are now retryable across providers тАФ a dead gateway key instantly fails over to OpenAI/Anthropic direct when configured (previously `auth` was non-retryable, killing the whole chat)
- Raw provider errors are NEVER sent to the UI again тАФ full diagnostics stay in server logs only
- User's FINAL BLOCK directive takes priority: if Vercel AI Gateway is not strictly required, remove it and route directly to the AI provider тАФ this would eliminate the dead-key blocker entirely
- Rork proxy (`toolkit.rork.com`) is a potential alternative path that bypasses the need for a Vercel AI Gateway key entirely тАФ but requires `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` which is not set
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers
- `EXPO_PACKAGER_PROXY_URL` env var used to make Metro manifest URLs public through localtunnel

## Next Steps
- **Audit whether Vercel AI Gateway is required**: determine if `createGateway` can be replaced with direct OpenAI SDK calls or the Rork proxy тАФ this is the user's #1 directive
- **If gateway NOT required**: remove `createGateway` dependency, replace with direct provider module, route Render backend directly to AI provider
- **If gateway IS required**: the key is proven dead (401) тАФ user must create a new one at vercel.com тЖТ AI Gateway тЖТ API Keys тЖТ Create Key and bind it to Render manually (dashboard.render.com тЖТ Environment тЖТ `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`)
- **Alternatively**: provision `EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY` via `getOrCreateToolkitSecret` to use the Rork proxy path (bypasses Vercel key requirement)
- **Verify environment-variable binding at runtime** (not build time)
- **Test owner-room with real prompt**: verify assistant replies, conversation persistence, realtime updates, reload recovery, no duplicates/missing messages
- **Commit and deploy fix to production** via GitHub push тЖТ Render auto-deploy (or manual Render dashboard deploy if API key unavailable)
- **Provide required proof AтАУK**: root cause, gateway kept/removed, active provider, active model, runtime var binding, HTTP result, successful owner-room conversation, GitHub commit SHA, Render deploy ID, `/health` = 200, screenshot
- Deploy enterprise guard fix (rides auto-deploy pipeline on next sync)

## Critical Context
- Workspace project ID: `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (Swift project тАФ cannot preview React Native)
- GitHub canonical repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, 143 commits)
- Latest GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` тАФ matches live backend
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (GoTrue v2.192.0 healthy)
- Expo SDK 54.0.35, bundle ID `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- Expo Go tunnel: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081) тАФ may need restart
- `ios/IVX26/ContentView.swift` тАФ still the empty placeholder
- `rork.json` currently: IVX26 (swift, `ios`) + Functions (cloudflare, `functions`)
- AI gateway error proven live: `vck_...HTYQ` тЖТ 401 "Authentication failed" from `https://ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v1/credits` and `/v1/chat/completions`
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: `createGateway({apiKey: getIVXAIGatewayApiKey(), baseURL})` at line 678 (streaming) and line 368 (non-streaming); `getIVXAIGatewayApiKey()` at line 152 reads `process.env.AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`; `getGatewayBaseUrlCandidates()` at line 173; `isIVXAIConfigured()` at line 279 checks both root URL and key length > 0; `hasGatewayKey` gate added at line 332
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: fallback chain `vercel_ai_gateway` тЖТ `openai_direct` тЖТ `anthropic_direct`; `isFailureRetryable()` now includes `'auth'`; `classifyProviderFailure()` now detects `unauthenticated`/`invalid api key`/`ai_gateway_api_key`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: error catch block sanitized тАФ `visibleAnswer` is now the canned string, not raw error; `providerError` client payload has no stack/message/origin; structured `console.error` at `provider_failure_structured` label
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: `fallbackTriggersOnly` array updated to include `'auth'`
- Cloudflare Worker `functions/index.ts`: enhanced with `extractVercelKey()`, `extractRenderKey()`, `testAIGatewayKey()`, `setRenderEnvVar()`, `DEFAULT_RENDER_SERVICE_ID = 'srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0'`; actions: `env-check`, `gateway-test`, `render-test`, `render-set-ai-key`, `render-deploy-status`; deployed codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1`
- Rork proxy skill (`.rork/skills/ai/proxy.md`): `${TOOLKIT_URL}/v2/vercel/v1/chat/completions` тЖТ `ai-gateway.vercel.sh/v1/chat/completions`; requires `Authorization: Bearer <EXPO_PUBLIC_RORK_TOOLKIT_SECRET_KEY>`; `EXPO_PUBLIC_TOOLKIT_URL` is empty in sandbox
- `backend/services/ivx-rork-independence.ts`: IVX тЖТ Rork independence engine with 4 phases (shadow тЖТ ivx_primary тЖТ independence тЖТ final_removal); read-only phase derivation

## Relevant Files
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts` тАФ AI runtime wrapper: `createGateway`/`generateText`/`streamText`; gateway key read at line 152; `hasGatewayKey` gate at 332; streaming guard at 659; this is the file to modify if removing gateway dependency
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts` тАФ multi-provider fallback chain; `auth` now retryable; `classifyProviderFailure()` detects `unauthenticated`/`invalid api key`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts` тАФ owner AI handler; error catch sanitized; no raw stack traces in UI; structured server-side logging added
- `backend/api/ivx-aut
